last_completed_item: Created and validated the Contract Steward batch with 12 small contract-first tasks; two of sixteen agent batches are now generated and no game implementation was performed.
next_action: Review the Contract Steward batch. On explicit continuation, generate exactly the next planned batch, stage1-evidence-harness, with 10 small tasks on the same branch. Do not generate implementation code, the canonical backlog, collaboration assignments or the task-split pull request until every agent batch has been generated and reviewed.
resume_instruction: Read assembly/context/NEW_CHAT_RESUME.md first and follow it exactly.
blockers: Fourteen planned agent batches remain to be generated one at a time.

Foundation plus Contract Steward estimates total 7.3 focused lead days against the accepted S1.0 cap of 5 days; Dispatch requires human re-estimation, scope sequencing or an approved milestone-cap amendment. Evidence-critical contracts, accessibility, diagnostics, reliability and performance may not be cut to hide the overrun.
The task backlog, collaboration-state finalization and task-split pull request remain blocked until all indexed batches validate.
Implementation and Dispatch remain blocked until the completed task-split pull request is explicitly approved and merged.
